name: dp-cto
description: CTO orchestration layer — /dp-cto:work-plan for brainstorming and planning, /dp-cto:work-run for adaptive dispatch with Agent Teams and beads-aware harness hooks, /dp-cto:work-run-loop for iterative loops, /dp-cto:work-polish for multi-perspective review, /dp-cto:quality-fact-check for research validation. PostCompact state preservation ensures stage machine survives long sessions.
